'''Lors''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The closest to the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Duro (star)|Duro]], Lors was a searing rock with one [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="CatCW" />
